title: Managed templates to update items in existing and new boards
excerpt:
Description
Managed templates - publish item and sub-item edits 
What are you trying to achieve
I often update the items and sub-items in managed templates and want these changes to be published to all my existing boards…

posts.author: Denise.Harper (Denise Harper)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Managed templates - publish item and sub-item edits

What are you trying to achieve

I often update the items and sub-items in managed templates and want these changes to be published to all my existing boards. This is not possible on managed boards so I have to update each board individually!
